box o' fun.name: Box o' Fun
box o' fun.reason: Mystic Forge conversion from cheap TP-buyable inputs — on-demand, minutes of effort for the qty-5 need

chak egg.name: Chak Egg
chak egg.reason: common drop from chak in Tangled Depths — one short farm session covers the qty-5 need

coin.name: Coin
coin.reason: gold is the app's buy axis (buy-out split / finishable-by-gold), not a time gate

glob of dark matter.name: Dark Matter
glob of dark matter.reason: salvaged from exotics with rare+ kits — gold-convertible on demand via TP-bought exotics

icy runestone.name: Icy Runestone
icy runestone.reason: vendor purchase for coin (Rojan the Penitent, 1g each) — pace is gold, not a cap

mystic runestone.name: Mystic Runestone
mystic runestone.reason: vendor purchase for coin (Miyani, 1g each) — pace is gold, not a cap

philosopher's stone.name: Philosopher's Stone
philosopher's stone.reason: vendor purchase from Miyani for Spirit Shards (10 per shard) — the shard pace is tracked as its own gate

pile of recycled siege equipment.name: Pile of Recycled Siege Equipment
pile of recycled siege equipment.reason: WvW vendor purchase with Badges of Honor — the badge pace is tracked as its own gate

reclaimed metal plate.name: Reclaimed Metal Plate
reclaimed metal plate.reason: drops from Tangled Depths meta/chests — one short farm session covers the qty-5 need

seer runestone.name: Seer Runestone
seer runestone.reason: vendor purchase for coin (Visions of Eternity runestone vendor) — pace is gold, not a cap

shard o' war.name: Shard o' War
shard o' war.reason: Gen2 precursor forge component crafted from largely TP-buyable inputs — precursors are modeled at piece granularity (leaf-policy)
